name: Bilibili MCP Server
what_it_does: Bilibili MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Bilibili (B站) — China's major video streaming and content platform — searching videos, retrieving video metadata and comments, accessing trending content, fetching user information, and integrating Bilibili's content discovery into agent-driven research and content analysis workflows.
use_cases: Searching Bilibili for video content from research agents
Retrieving video metadata, descriptions, and tags from content analysis agents
Accessing trending Chinese-language video content from market research agents
Fetching video comments and engagement data from sentiment analysis agents
Building Chinese video content discovery tools from media agents
Monitoring Bilibili channel activity from content creator agents
not_for: Non-Chinese-language video content (Bilibili is primarily Chinese-language)
Downloading or republishing Bilibili content (violates ToS)
best_when: An agent needs to search and analyze Chinese-language video content on Bilibili — particularly for research into Chinese internet culture, gaming content, or technology tutorials popular on B站.
avoid_when: You target Western video platforms — use YouTube MCP instead. Avoid for content download or mass scraping.

auth.notes: Public API endpoints work without authentication. User-specific data (subscriptions, history, personal recommendations) requires Bilibili cookie auth. Unofficial API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Bilibili public API: free for reasonable use
pricing.notes: Bilibili public API is free. Community MCP. Unofficial API with no formal rate limit documentation.

performance.rate_limits: Unofficial Bilibili API — undocumented rate limits; respect throttling

known_agent_gotchas: Unofficial Bilibili API — not publicly documented; changes with app updates
China data residency — content subject to Chinese content regulations
Rate limiting undocumented — aggressive requests may trigger blocks
Cookie auth required for personalized content — cookie expires periodically
Video availability varies by region — some content geo-restricted
Community MCP — documentation primarily in Chinese
agent_readiness.security_notes: Unofficial Bilibili API. China data residency. HTTPS enforced. Cookie auth optional. Community MCP. Respect ToS — no mass scraping or content redistribution.

security_score_components.security_notes: Unofficial API. China data residency. HTTPS. Cookie auth optional. Community MCP.
